name: ExtensionAdverseEvent_SuspectEntity_Causality_EntityRelatedness
title: R5: Result of the assessment regarding the relatedness of the suspected entity to the event additional types
description: R5: `AdverseEvent.suspectEntity.causality.entityRelatedness` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (coding)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `AdverseEvent.suspectEntity.causality.entityRelatedness` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`AdverseEvent.suspectEntity.causality.entityRelatedness` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `AdverseEvent.suspectEntity.causality.entityRelatedness` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `AdverseEvent.suspectEntity.causality.productRelatedness` 0..1 `string`
*  R4: `AdverseEvent.suspectEntity.causality.productRelatedness` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `AdverseEvent.suspectEntity.causality.entityRelatedness` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `AdverseEvent.suspectEntity.causality.productRelatedness` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `AdverseEvent.suspectEntity.causality.entityRelatedness` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `AdverseEvent.suspectEntity.causality.entityRelatedness` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: coding.
